entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 23:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 03:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 20/08/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz398 Cluster107 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 14, 04:33 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 14/05/2026 04:16 UTC
End time : 14/07/2026 04:18 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 14, 04:22 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Filerz398 Cluster107.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 14/05/2026 04:16 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz398 is unreachable on the Cluster107.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS/GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jul 13, 14:27 UTC
Update - Scheduled maintenance is still in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 13, 14:25 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 13, 14:23 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer in BHS and GRA regions.

Start time : 13/07/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 17/07/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : Our services will be partially impacted, with expected latencies on management tasks (domain add/modification, configuration updates, etc.) as well as on some websites during the maintenance.
Linked to this maintenance : https://public-cloud.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/m5qn00qgl9zh.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster124 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 11, 01:09 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 10/07/2026 15:20 UTC
End time : 11/07/2026 01:02 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 10, 16:14 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific Cluster124.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/07/2026 15:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster124 is temporarily facing latency.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing slowness when trying to access and use their websites located in Cluster124.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
